message.content:
@startuml
title uc2_6活动执行时序图

actor "管理员" as actor1
actor "管理员" as actor2

rectangle "web" as web1
rectangle "web" as web2
rectangle "sever" as sever1
rectangle "sever" as sever2

database "活动快照表" as db1
database "活动快照表" as db2
database "活动结果表" as db3
database "活动结果表" as db4

actor1 ..> web1
actor2 ..> web2
web1 ..> sever1
web2 ..> sever2
sever1 ..> db1
sever2 ..> db2
db1 ..> db3
db2 ..> db4

@enduml
